offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual log generation causes late compliance reports. We automate compliance audit logs instead of manual log generation and tracking.
problem: Difficulty in generating timely compliance audit logs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo
Share insights in accounting forums and groups
try_it: Let users try manual log entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
